_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your real values. Do NOT commit config.json with a real token to git/public repos.
redirect_message_template: {user} It looks like you have a question. Please ask it in {support_channel} so the Mighty Kraken can help you. Messages in #general may not receive support.
welcome_message_template: {user} just joined {server}! 🎉 Welcome aboard — check out #rules to get started.
